title: Crossword
description:
Write an AI to generate crossword puzzles, modeled as a constraint satisfaction problem. Each sequence of squares is a variable whose value is a word; unary constraints come from word length and binary constraints come from overlaps between variables.

In `generate.py`, complete `enforce_node_consistency`, `revise`, `ac3`, `assignment_complete`, `consistent`, `order_domain_values`, `select_unassigned_variable`, and `backtrack`:

- `enforce_node_consistency` removes any word whose length doesn't match the variable's length.
- `revise(x, y)` makes `x` arc consistent with `y` (returns True if the domain changed).
- `ac3(arcs=None)` enforces arc consistency; returns False if any domain empties.
- `consistent` checks distinctness, lengths, and overlap agreement.
- `order_domain_values` orders values by the least-constraining-values heuristic.
- `select_unassigned_variable` uses MRV, breaking ties by degree.
- `backtrack` performs backtracking search and returns a complete assignment or None.

You should not modify `crossword.py`.

**Example:**
```
$ python generate.py data/structure1.txt data/words1.txt output.png
‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą
‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖąM‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖąR‚Ėą
‚ĖąINTELLIGENCE‚Ėą
...
```
